chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1059 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 24.08.2023 Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents-Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur has filed details of outstanding amount and payment schedule; a copy whereof is supplied to son of petitioner who is present in Court. Learned Counsel further undertakes that leave encashment in lieu of Leave Preparatory to Retirement (LPR) i.e. Rs.6,28,320/- (Rupees six lac twenty eight thousand three hundred twenty) would be paid to the petitioner within ten days and remaining amount of commutation i.e. Rs.19,61,253/- (Rupees nineteen lac sixty one thousand two hundred fifty three) would be paid to the petitioner within three months. He further submits that as per schedule filed by him today, all the payments would be made to the petitioner. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of; however, if the respondents commit any default in aforesaid payments, the contempt proceedings would be initiated against them. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
